name: Start Practice Button
description: This mod adds a new button before the start of the level to start practice.

use-menu-buttons.name: Place Button in Menu with Buttons

show-only-practice-on-editor.name: Show only the practice button in editor

show-restart-practice-button.name: Add a practice restart button
show-restart-practice-button.description: Adds a button to the level completion menu to restart the level immediately in practice
